procedures.description: Established Patient Office or Other Outpatient Visit With High Level of Medical Decision Making, if Using Time, 40 Minutes or More

summary: This document is an itemization of services for patient Jane Doe from Mayo Clinic, with a statement date of January 15, 2025. It details professional charges totaling $612.00 for services rendered on July 3, 2024, including an office visit and medication administration. After professional payments and adjustments, the remaining visit balance is $538.56.

medical_terms.meaning: Ciprofloxacin is an antibiotic used to treat a variety of bacterial infections. Administering it intravenously (IV) means it is given directly into a vein.

A CPT (Current Procedural Terminology) code representing an established patient office or other outpatient visit, indicating a high level of medical decision making or 40 minutes or more of time spent.
National Drug Code, a unique 10-digit, 3-segment number assigned to all FDA-approved prescription and over-the-counter drug products in the United States.
Diagnosis Code, a medical classification code used to identify diseases, disorders, symptoms, and other reasons for encounters.

patient_advice: Review the itemized services and charges carefully to ensure accuracy and match them against any personal records you may have.
Contact Mayo Clinic at 1-844-217-9591 or use their online services at www.mayoclinic.org/onlineservices if you have any questions about your account or wish to make a payment.
recommended_questions: Could you provide a more detailed breakdown or explanation of the services included in the 'Established Patient Office or Other Outpatient Visit' charge?
Are there any additional financial assistance programs or payment plan options available to help manage the remaining balance?
